steps.title: Apply the no-solution condition
steps.content: Rewrite as $7r-pw=-6$ and $7r-10w=11$. For no solution, coefficients of $r$ and $w$ must be proportional: $$\frac{7}{7}=\frac{-p}{-10}.$$

steps.title: Solve for the parameter
steps.content: This gives $1=\tfrac{p}{10}$, so $p=10$. The constants differ, confirming no solution. The answer is 10.
